issue_summary: Use method signature as fallback in Alphanumeric
javadoc_before:
/** * {@code MethodOrderer} that sorts methods alphanumerically based on their * names using {@link String#compareTo(String)}. * *

If two methods have the same name, {@link Method#toString()} will be * used as a fallback for comparing them. */
javadoc_after:
/** * {@code MethodOrderer} that sorts methods alphanumerically based on their * names using {@link String#compareTo(String)}. * *

If two methods have the same name, the combinations of their names and * formal parameter lists will be used as a fallback for comparing them. */
